name: vk-text-replacer-bot
description: Monorepo prototype: Telegram bot + worker + shared package

scripts.dev: concurrently -n tg,worker -c green,cyan "npm --prefix apps/tg-bot run dev" "npm --prefix apps/worker run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix packages/shared run build && npm --prefix apps/tg-bot run build && npm --prefix apps/worker run build
scripts.start: concurrently -n tg,worker -c green,cyan "npm --prefix apps/tg-bot run start" "npm --prefix apps/worker run start"
